b:with.value:
{ sideMenu: "Side Gadgets", menu: "Menu", followOn: "Follow on", shareTo: "Share to", copyURL: "URL Copy", copyMessage: "The URL has been copied.
Paste(Ctrl+V) it in the desired location.", filter: "", view: "View", expandPosts: "Expand Posts", shrinkPosts: "Shrink Posts", followByEmailMessage: "Get updates right in your inbox. Join to get notified with all new stuff", backToTop: "Back To Top", emotions: "Emotions", emotionsInfo: "Copy and paste emojis inside comment box", page: "page", of: "of", go: "GO", monthsNames: "Jan Feb Mar Apr May Jun Jul Aug Sep Oct Nov Dec" }

{ enableSideGadgets: true, enableDarkSideMenuStyle: true, hideTopNav: false, enableWavyStyle: false, enableStickyHeader: true, enableStickySidebar: true, enableIndexSidebar: false, enablePagesSidebar: true, enableFilterOption: true, switchFilterToLabels: false, enableViewOption: true, enableShrinkedPosts: false, enableShrinkingForAll: true, enableImagesAutoHeight: false, enableInfiniteScroll: true, enablePostsNavigation: true, enableRoundedCorners: true, enableHeaderSearchForm: false, enableIncreasedWidth: false, enablePostsListView: false, enableMediaHoverAnimation: true, enableGridPostSnippet: true, colorsStyle: "dark", cookiesPosition: "bottom_right", dropMenuIconName: "arrow-down", bigDropMenuIconName: "triangle-down", megaMenuIconName: "chevron-double-right" }
{ hideFacebook: false, hideTwitter: false, hideWhatsapp: false, hideTelegram: false, hidePinterest: false, hideReddit: false, hideLinkedin: false, hideTumblr: false, hideCopyUrl: false }

{ header1st: "Page not found", header2nd: "Error 404 - Ooops!", message: "It might has been removed, renamed Or temporarily unavailable. Search again!", enableFeaturedPosts: true, featuredPostsMaxResults: 6 }
{ enableGridPostsAds: false, enableTopPostAd: false, enableMiddlePostAd: false, enableBottomPostAd: false, disablePostsAds: false, disablePagesAds: true }
{ enable: false, showStamp: true, showJumpTo: true, maxPostsCount: 6, maxLinksCount: 3 }

nav.class: relative py-6 transition-[padding,background-color,box-shadow,backdrop-filter] duration-500 lg:py-8 xl:py-9 max-[768px]:bg-white/92 max-[768px]:py-[14px] max-[768px]:shadow-[0px_0px_10px_rgb(0,0,0,0.1)] max-[768px]:dark:bg-semidark

img.class: h-auto w-[124px] opacity-95 transition-all duration-500 hover:opacity-100 dark:opacity-80 dark:hover:opacity-100 dark:brightness-90 dark:hover:brightness-100 lg:w-[158px] xl:w-[170px]

div.class: max-md:hidden flex items-center md:gap-6 lg:gap-8 xl:gap-10
shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-custom/80 bg-white/35 p-1 shadow-[0_10px_24px_rgba(15,23,42,0.06)] backdrop-blur-sm dark:bg-white/5 dark:shadow-none

button.class: relative z-10 flex h-9 w-9 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full text-dark/75 transition-[color,opacity] duration-300 before:absolute before:inset-x-[-5px] before:bottom-[-5px] before:z-[-10] before:h-0 before:bg-custom before:transition-[height] before:duration-300 hover:text-white hover:before:h-[calc(100%+10px)] dark:text-white/90

div.class: flex items-center gap-3 lg:gap-4 relative z-50
shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-custom/80 bg-white/35 px-3 py-1.5 shadow-[0_10px_24px_rgba(15,23,42,0.06)] backdrop-blur-sm dark:bg-white/5 dark:shadow-none

a.class: flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[11px] font-semibold leading-none text-dark/85 hover:text-custom dark:text-white/85 dark:hover:text-custom transition-colors duration-300

div.class: md:hidden shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-custom/80 bg-white/35 p-1 shadow-[0_10px_24px_rgba(15,23,42,0.06)] backdrop-blur-sm dark:bg-white/5 dark:shadow-none

button.class: relative z-10 flex h-9 w-9 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full text-dark/75 transition-[color,opacity] duration-300 before:absolute before:inset-x-[-5px] before:bottom-[-5px] before:z-[-10] before:h-0 before:bg-custom before:transition-[height] before:duration-300 hover:text-white hover:before:h-[calc(100%+10px)] dark:text-white/90
mobile-menu-button -mr-2.5 block p-2.5 outline-none text-dark dark:text-white

section.class: relative flex items-center overflow-hidden py-24 lg:min-h-screen lg:py-32

img.class: pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 h-full w-full object-cover light-only
pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 h-full w-full object-cover dark-only

div.class: order-2 mx-auto max-w-[680px] lg:order-1 lg:mx-0 lg:max-w-[640px] xl:max-w-[720px]

h3.class: !font-secondary !text-[21px] font-medium leading-[1.2] !text-custom text-center lg:text-left lg:!text-[28px] xl:!text-[42px]

h1.class: mb-3 text-center !font-secondary !text-[42px] font-medium leading-[1.08] sm:!text-[54px] md:!text-[64px] lg:mb-5 lg:!text-left lg:!text-[72px] xl:!text-[92px] !text-dark dark:!text-white

p.class: mx-auto mb-4 max-w-[22rem] text-center !text-lg font-medium leading-[1.45] sm:max-w-[32rem] lg:mx-0 lg:mb-9 lg:max-w-none lg:!text-left lg:!text-[21px] xl:!text-[30px] !text-dark dark:!text-white

span.class: inline-flex flex-wrap items-baseline justify-center lg:justify-start gap-x-1.5

span.data-words: ISO Baş Denetçi,İŞG Uzmanı,Web Geliştirici,Problem Çözücü

div.class: mx-auto mb-[30px] max-w-[640px] overflow-visible lg:ml-0 lg:mb-[42px] xl:max-w-[690px]

p.class: select-text text-center !text-base leading-[1.52] !text-muted dark:!text-white lg:text-left lg:!text-[18px] xl:!text-[23px]

div.p:
On yıldır iş yerlerini güvende, kuruluşları standartlara uygun tutuyorum. Bruce Wayne değilim — ama geceleri
maskemi takıp kod yazıyorum.

div.class: flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-5 sm:flex-row sm:gap-[25px] lg:justify-start

a.class: relative z-10 inline-block overflow-hidden rounded-full border-2 border-custom px-[35px] py-[14px] font-secondary font-medium !text-white transition-all duration-300 before:absolute before:inset-x-[-5px] before:bottom-[-5px] before:z-[-1] before:h-[112%] before:bg-custom before:transition-[height] before:duration-300 hover:!text-black dark:hover:!text-black hover:before:h-0 md:px-12 dark:!text-white

ul.class: list-none flex flex-wrap items-center justify-center gap-2.5

a.class: flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-neutral-300 bg-neutral-500/5 text-dark transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 hover:border-custom hover:bg-custom hover:text-white active:scale-95 dark:border-white/20 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-white dark:hover:text-white

i.class: fa-brands fa-x-twitter w-4 h-4 flex items-center justify-center

a.class: flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-neutral-300 bg-neutral-500/5 text-dark transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 hover:border-custom hover:bg-custom hover:text-white active:scale-95 dark:border-white/20 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-white dark:hover:text-white

i.class: fa-brands fa-instagram w-4 h-4 flex items-center justify-center

a.class: flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-neutral-300 bg-neutral-500/5 text-dark transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 hover:border-custom hover:bg-custom hover:text-white active:scale-95 dark:border-white/20 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-white dark:hover:text-white

i.class: fa-brands fa-facebook-f w-4 h-4 flex items-center justify-center

a.class: flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-neutral-300 bg-neutral-500/5 text-dark transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 hover:border-custom hover:bg-custom hover:text-white active:scale-95 dark:border-white/20 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-white dark:hover:text-white

i.class: fa-brands fa-linkedin-in w-4 h-4 flex items-center justify-center

a.class: flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-neutral-300 bg-neutral-500/5 text-dark transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 hover:border-custom hover:bg-custom hover:text-white active:scale-95 dark:border-white/20 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-white dark:hover:text-white

i.class: fa-brands fa-github w-4 h-4 flex items-center justify-center

a.class: flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-neutral-300 bg-neutral-500/5 text-dark transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 hover:border-custom hover:bg-custom hover:text-white active:scale-95 dark:border-white/20 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-white dark:hover:text-white

i.class: fa-solid fa-link w-4 h-4 flex items-center justify-center

span.class: max-lg:hidden flex h-[78px] w-[78px] items-center rounded-[18px] shadow-[24px_0px_72px_rgb(54,32,152,0.3)] [animation:var(--animate-home-skill-float)] lg:absolute bg-[#a7f175] left-0 top-3 xl:-left-2 xl:top-2
mx-auto flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center text-white

max-lg:hidden flex h-[78px] w-[78px] items-center rounded-[18px] shadow-[24px_0px_72px_rgb(54,32,152,0.3)] [animation:var(--animate-home-skill-float)] lg:absolute bg-[#323330] -right-5 top-18 xl:-right-8 xl:top-22
mx-auto flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center

max-lg:hidden flex h-[78px] w-[78px] items-center rounded-[18px] shadow-[24px_0px_72px_rgb(54,32,152,0.3)] [animation:var(--animate-home-skill-float)] lg:absolute bg-white -left-6 bottom-16 xl:-left-9 xl:bottom-20
mx-auto flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center

div.class: absolute bottom-6 left-1/2 z-[5] -translate-x-1/2 text-center lg:bottom-[48px]

pointer-events-none absolute bottom-[-28px] left-1/2 z-10 w-[100.5vw] min-w-[1600px] max-w-none -translate-x-1/2 select-none text-[#f4f0e7] dark:text-[#2b2d33] drop-shadow-[0_-8px_16px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)] dark:drop-shadow-[0_-8px_16px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3)]

footer.class: py-16 border-t border-black/5 dark:border-white/5 bg-[#faf7f3] dark:bg-semidark text-muted dark:text-darkmuted bg-none

div.class: maingrid flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-6
fixed inset-y-0 right-0 z-50 w-80 bg-white dark:bg-semidark border-l border-black/5 dark:border-white/5 shadow-lg transform translate-x-full transition-transform duration-300 hidden
pointer-events-none fixed right-5 bottom-5 z-50 translate-x-6 opacity-0 transition-all duration-300 sm:right-6 sm:bottom-6

svg.class: pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 h-full w-full -rotate-90 overflow-visible

span.class: absolute left-1/2 top-[3px] block h-2.5 w-2.5 -translate-x-1/2 rounded-full border border-white/70 bg-[#fff7f1] shadow-[0_0_0_4px_rgba(247,80,35,0.18),0_0_18px_rgba(247,80,35,0.45)] dark:border-white/50 dark:bg-[#ffd5c7]

button.class: pointer-events-auto absolute inset-[7px] flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-white/50 bg-white/75 text-[#a8481a] shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(15,23,42,0.16),inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.8)] backdrop-blur-md transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:scale-[1.06] hover:border-[#f2b29b] hover:bg-white/88 hover:shadow-[0_22px_46px_rgba(247,80,35,0.22)] focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#d96b38]/40 dark:border-white/10 dark:bg-[#231713]/85 dark:text-[#ffd7c8] dark:shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.42),inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.05)] dark:hover:border-[#a8481a] dark:hover:bg-[#2d1b15]/90

span.class: absolute inset-x-3 bottom-2 h-px bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-[#f75023]/45 to-transparent
